reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para pasar a tomar un poco de aire fumar un Cigarro y estirar las piernas .

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to stop by, get some fresh air, smoke a cigarette and stretch your legs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtLXIzX0FREAE

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar agradable, pero deberían contratar más playeros; mucho tiempo de espera para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
It's a nice place, but they should hire more beach attendants; there's a long wait time for fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdXVhblZREAE

reviews.comment:
Pésimo. Media hora esperando y nunca avisan que no tienen nafta.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. Half an hour waiting, and they never let me know they're out of gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteXZQOGVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para comer!

(Translated by Google)
Great place to eat!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtb3RMczhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Se puede calentar agua. Tiene baños y podes descansar un poco en la sombra del autoservicio

(Translated by Google)
You can heat water. It has restrooms and you can rest a bit in the shade of the self-service area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdlBULXlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.  Riquísimo el cafe

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Delicious coffee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdEppUHh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada casi obligada para continuar viaje, baños, zafan, pero no son hermosos! Los playeros, muy atentos. Tienen para medir la presión de las ruedas y funciona bien, la confitería tiene variedad y surtido de cosas, a veces hay demora en la carga de combustible por mucha concurrencia

(Translated by Google)
An almost obligatory stop before continuing your journey. There are restrooms and a shuttle bus, but they're not beautiful! The beach attendants are very attentive. They have tire pressure gauges, and they work well. The cafeteria has a variety and selection of items. Sometimes there are delays in refueling due to high traffic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbElYRHVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Agradezco al personal  que encontró tarjeta y documentos y nos los guardó

(Translated by Google)
I thank the staff who found the card and documents and kept them for us.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcExhYXlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
No emiten factura A si pagas con la app, el café media calidad y se me rompió el vehículo y como no soy de ahí no me dieron mucha ayuda

(Translated by Google)
They don't issue an invoice even if you pay with the app, the coffee is of average quality and my vehicle broke down and since I'm not from there, they didn't give me much help.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtc09hTjJ3RRAB
